title: Sub-Decree #42 on the Control of Air Pollution and Noise Disturbance
title_en: Sub-Decree #42 on the Control of Air Pollution and Noise Disturbance
short_name: Sub-Decree #42 on the Control of Air Pollution and Noise ...

provisions.title: This sub-degree has a purpose to protect the environment quality
provisions.content:
and public health from air pollutions and noise pollution through
monitoring, curb and mitigation activities.

provisions.title: This sub-decree applies to all movable sources and immovable
provisions.content: sources of air and noise pollution.

provisions.title: Technical terms use in this sub-decree shall have the meaning
provisions.content:
ascribed there to:
A-“Source of pollution” is divided into two terms:
- Movable source refers to emission sources without permanent
location such as aircraft, ship, vehicle port transportation
service…etc.
- Immovable sources refers to emission sources with permanent
location such as factory, enterprise, warehouse, construction
site, incinerator…etc.

B-“Pollutant” refers to smoke, dust, ash particle substance, gas,
vapour, fog, odour, radio-active substance…etc.
“Flammable substance” refers to fuel ail, cod, natural gas and
might be caught flammable reaction.

provisions.chapter: Chapter 2: Provisions on emission of air and noise pollution
provisions.title: Air quality standard shall be specified in the Annex-1 of the sub-
provisions.content:
degree.
The standard of maximum quality of hazardous substance
allowing in the air shall be specified in the Annex-2 of this sub-
decree.

provisions.chapter: Chapter 2: Provisions on emission of air and noise pollution
provisions.title: The standard of maximum into the atmosphere shall be specified
provisions.content:
in the Annex-3 of this sub-decree.
This standard of smoke emission from movable source shall be
specified in the Annex-4 of the sub-decree.

-2-

FROM : ILO GAMENT SECTOR PROJECT CAM FAX NO. : 855 23 212903 Mar. 11 2003 05:03PM P3

provisions.chapter: Chapter 2: Provisions on emission of air and noise pollution
provisions.title: In the necessary cases, the standards were stipulated in Article 4
provisions.content:
and Article 5 of this sub-decree shall be recognized and changed
every 5 years, based on the proposal of the Ministry of
Environment.

provisions.chapter: Chapter 2: Provisions on emission of air and noise pollution
provisions.title: The standard for noise emission from various resources like
provisions.content:
vehicle, manufacturing place and the standard for maximum
noise emission for public and residential areas shall be specified
in the Annex 5, Annex 6 and Annex 7 of this sub-degree.

provisions.chapter: Chapter 2: Provisions on emission of air and noise pollution
provisions.title: The emission of pollutants into the atmosphere exceeds the
provisions.content:
standard which stipulated in the Annex 3 and Annex 4 of this
sub-decree be strictly prohibited.

provisions.chapter: Chapter 2: Provisions on emission of air and noise pollution
provisions.title: The importation and production of flammable substances
provisions.content:
containing S. Pb. C.H. Hydro-carbon shall be complied with the
standard which stipulated in the Annex 8 of this sub-decree.

provisions.chapter: Chapter 2: Provisions on emission of air and noise pollution
provisions.title: The importation utilization, vehicle and its spare-part production
provisions.content:
in Cambodia which emitted pollutants and noise exceeding the
standard as stipulated in the Annex 4 and Annex 5 of this sub-
decree shall be strictly prohibited.

provisions.chapter: Chapter 2: Provisions on emission of air and noise pollution
provisions.title: The discharge or leakage of various flammable substance, fuel-
provisions.content:
oil, radio-active or chemical substance into the atmosphere,
water and oil shall be strictly prohibited.

provisions.title: The emission of pollutants and noise from immovable source
provisions.content:
into the atmosphere shall be asked for a permission from the
Ministry of Environment and shall be sent the application from
copy to concerned ministries and agencies.

-3-

FROM : ILO GAMENT SECTOR PROJECT CAM FAX NO. : 855 23 212903 Mar. 11 2003 05:03PM P4

provisions.title: The asking of an import permission of flammable substance shall
provisions.content:
be attached the analytical result which emphasized the quantity
of importation or production.

provisions.title: The asking for discharge permission as stipulated in the Article
provisions.content:
13 of the sub-decree shall be carried out for new project and
ongoing Assessment’s report.

provisions.title: The master or person who responsible for pollution source as
provisions.content:
stipulate in the Article 13 and Article 14 of this sub-decree shall
be applied for permission from the Ministry of Environment:
- 40 days before the project commencement in Phnom Penh
- 60 days before the project commencement in town or province

provisions.title: The monitoring of flammable substance’s quantity, air pollutant
provisions.content:
emission and noise causing from immovable source is the
responsibility of the Ministry of Environment.

provisions.title: The monitoring of smoke and noise emission from movable
provisions.content:
source is the responsibility of the Ministry of Environment in
collaboration with line ministries and institution. The monitoring
procedure shall be determined by join declaration among line
ministries.

provisions.title: Ministry of Environment shall be prepared technical guidelines
provisions.content:
on pollution source monitoring sampling point, air and noise
analysis.

provisions.title: Ministry of Environment shall be taken sample at all emission
provisions.content:
points of pollution source. The master of person who responsible
for pollution source shall collaborate the staff of environment
who conduct a sampling to fulfil their technical duty.

provisions.title: During conducting Environment inspection or controlling in the
provisions.content:
sources of pollution the Ministry of Environment inspectors can

-4-

FROM : ILO GAMENT SECTOR PROJECT CAM FAX NO. : 855 23 212903 Mar. 11 2003 05:03PM P5

Analyses the source in place or can take them to the
environmental laboratory for annualizing.

provisions.title: The owner or responsible person of pollution sources shall bear
provisions.content:
the cost of the cost of the analyses of his/her own sample
following the tariff determined by the Ministry of Environment
and the Ministry of Economic and finance. This income shall be
include into the National budget in order to allocate to the
Environmental Endowment Fund Account.

provisions.title: The owner or responsible person of the pollution sources may
provisions.content:
ask to have his/her pollution sample tested in other public or
private laboratories which are recognized formally and such
laboratories of Environment laboratory.

provisions.title: The owner or responsible person of pollution source shall:
provisions.content:
- Responsible for installing or equipping any equipment to
purity toxic substances and to reduce noise and vibration in
order to respond to Air pollution standard as stipulated in the
Annexes:
- Responsible for installing the equipment for measurement of
amount of pollutant contained in his/her pollution sources and
keep the result for record keeping. The result must send to the
Ministry of Environment every 3 months.
- Have at least an environmental compromising and prepare
environmental protection plan in their institution.
Environmentalist shall listed and recognized from the
Ministry of Environment and have the capability as required
by the Ministry of Environment.

provisions.title: Even if it is found out that the discharge of toxic substances and
provisions.content:
noise from any pollution source do not respond to the standard as
stipulated in the Article 5 and 7 of this sub-degree, the Ministry
of Environment shall:
a- Issue a written order requiring the owner or responsible
person of such pollution source to correct the violation
activities immediately within a specifies time period.
b- Issue are written order requiring the owner of responsible
person of such pollution source to stop his/her activities
temporarily until the violation is corrected if the violation

-5-

FROM : ILO GAMENT SECTOR PROJECT CAM FAX NO. : 855 23 212903 Mar. 11 2003 05:03PM P6

activities cause an adverse impact to human health and air
quality.

provisions.title: The Ministry of Environment shall regularly control and monitor
provisions.content:
the situation of the air quality through out the Kingdom of
Cambodia in order to take measure to prevent and reduce the
pollution.

provisions.title: The Ministry of Environment shall manage data relating result of
provisions.content:
the air quality testing and to assess the status of the air quality
and of the pollution of the Kingdom of Cambodia.

provisions.title: Even if it is found that any area is suffering of pollution which
provisions.content:
could threaten human life or environmental quality. The Ministry
of Environment shall immediately notify the public about the
danger and investigate to find out the sources of pollution and
shall take measure to prevent air pollution and to restore the air
quality.

provisions.title: The Ministry of Environment’s inspectors, while conducting
provisions.content:
environmental inspection shall complied with the following
procedures:
a- To present his/her identity card and mission letter while
entering into the premise or any site of pollution for
conducting inspection or tasking sample or for checking
record;
b- Primary record and report of the inspection or sample taking
shall be done at the site of inspection with participating from
any witness if necessary;

-6-

FROM : ILO GAMENT SECTOR PROJECT CAM FAX NO. : 855 23 212903 Mar. 11 2003 05:03PM P7

c-The inspectors may ask question and require the owner or
responsible person of the source of pollution to provide the
information and other relevant documents which are used for
report making and for evidence;
d- One copy of record or report shall be given to the owner or the
responsible person of the source of pollution and one copy to
the representatives of concerned ministries (who collaborate
with) and other one copy shall be kept at the Ministry of
Environment.

provisions.title: Where if there is complaint or report that any source of pollution
provisions.content:
discharges contaminant into human health or public property.
The Ministry of Environment in collaboration with concerned
ministries, may enter the site of this source of pollution and
conduct inspection and take sample for testing.

provisions.title: In the case of serious accident or imminent danger resulting from
provisions.content:
air pollution at public water area, the Ministry of Environment
shall make urgent inspection on the above problem and shall
inform the concerned ministries and local authority.

provisions.title: In the case of clear offense that cause air pollution, the inspector
provisions.content:
of the Ministry of Environment shall:
a- Take statement, collect and detain evidence of such offense
and make an administrative fine, if the offense has not
contaminates seriously or effect human health, public
properties and environmental quality.
b- Collect and detain evidence of such offense for making
statement and forward the case file to the competent agency,
if this offense causes serious pollution or affect to human
health of public properties and environmental quality.

-7-

FROM : ILO GAMENT SECTOR PROJECT CAM FAX NO. : 855 23 212903 Mar. 11 2003 05:03PM P8

provisions.title: Violations of this sub-degree shall be fined and punished
provisions.content: according to the articles 20, 21, 22, 23 and the article 25 of the

provisions.chapter: Chapter 9: of the Law on Environmental Protection and Natural
provisions.title: The Ministry of Environment’s official is responsible for making
provisions.content:
a report of prosecution for any person who violate any article of
this sub-decree. The Ministry of Environment shall take legal
action against any offense of this sub-decree.

provisions.chapter: Chapter 9: of the Law on Environmental Protection and Natural
provisions.title: Any environmental inspection official or agent who is negligent,
provisions.content:
fails to pay attention to fails to comply with the Ministry’s
regulations or conspires with a violator or facilitates the
commission of a violation shall be subject to administrative
sanction or face prosecution before the court.

provisions.title: Any provision contrary to this sub-degree shall be annulled.
provisions.content: Any provision contrary to this sub-degree shall be annulled.

provisions.title: The minister in charge of the cabinet of the council of Ministers,
provisions.content:
Ministers and concerned institutions shall co-operate with
Ministry of Environment and to implement and to implement this
sub-decree according to their duty.

provisions.title: This sub-decree shall be in force from the date of its signature.
provisions.content:
-8-
